subject: Tweaks for better CTF / polishing ?
body:
Hi Dimitry,

Very nice software package, we now have a map at 4 A from a tilted data 
set. 

Do you have any recommendations for ways to tweak the motion and CTF 
estimation for this dataset to see if we can improve resolution further? 
I'm tempted to try per particle polishing (a la Rubinstein or RELION) and 
CTF refinement to see if we can get 0.1-0.3A better.  I wasn't sure if Warp 
will have improved estimation of region/particle motion and CTF if we used 
a finer sampling. 

What do you think? We will likely need to collect more data, but it's 
always worth trying to squeeze the most out of our datasets!

Mike
